title: Airwick Botanica Air Freshener Room Spray Moroccan Mint and Pink Grapefruit, 236 ml
features: All our Botanical fragrances are crafted with ingredients inspired by nature, carefully sourced in a way that respects our Planet
Indulge in this aromatic blend, reminiscent of the hidden gardens of Moroccan palaces
Non-Aerosol. Bottle made with 99% recycled plastic. Trigger made with 35% recycled plastic
Fragrance Infused with Natural Essential Oils
Free from Dyes, Propellant, Phthalates & Acetone
description: Product Description Usage Direction 1. Remove safety stopper to release the trigger and dispose of stopper. 2. Direct away from face and pull trigger at least three times to start product flow. 3. Keep pack upright and pull trigger firmly each time you spray. 4. Store in a cool place away from direct sunlight. DO: Use in well ventilated areas. Use only as directed DO NOT: Spray directly onto surfaces. Spray on pets, pet bedding or housing. Spray directly onto foods or fabrics. Some hard surfaces may become damp and slippery when sprayed. In case of contact with surfaces, wipe immediately with damp cloth. NOTICE: PRODUCT CONTAINS PARTS THAT MAY POSE A CHOKING HAZARD. Ingredients None Required Safety Warning Some hard surfaces may become damp and slippery when sprayed. In case of contact with surfaces, wipe immediately with damp cloth. Use in well ventilated areas. Use only as directed. Do not spray directly onto surfaces, spray on pets, pet bedding or housing or spray directly on to foods or fabrics. Notice: product contains parts that may pose a choking hazard. Botanica by Airwick moroccan mint & pink grapefruit room spray. Keep out of reach of children. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. People suffering from perfume sensitivity should be cautious when using this product. Air fresheners do not replace good hygiene practices. Manufacturer Contact Information Wellcroft House Wellcroft Road Slough Sl1 4Aq See more
